verdict.description: APPROVED = ship it; REVISE = at least one issue must be addressed first.

summary.description: One-paragraph independent assessment: the overall judgment and the single most important point.

issues.description: Concrete problems found, most severe first. Empty array if none.

summary.description: What the problem is and why it matters.

location.description: Where it applies (file / section / step), or null if general.

status.description: First review: 'open'. On a resume re-review: set 'resolved' once the fix lands, else keep 'open'.
